name: Varunprasaath R. Selvaraju, Ph.D.
summary: PhD Chemist with 6+ years of experience in CMC analytical development, method development, and small molecule characterization for pharmaceutical applications. Expertise in chromatographic and spectroscopic techniques (HPLC, FT-IR, UV-Vis), thermal analysis (TGA, DSC), and method validation. Strong background in supporting process development, stability testing, and quality control activities. Proven ability to manage multiple analytical projects, develop SOPs, and deliver high-quality data under demanding timelines in collaborative research environments.

education.details:
Dissertation: Modular Design and Electrochemical Properties of Xanthene-Based Electrochromic Materials
Advisor: Prof. Seth Marder

education.degree: B.S. (Research), Major: Chemistry; Minor: Materials Science
education.details: INSPIRE Scholarship for Higher Education (Top 1% nationally)

bullets: Develop analytical methods for small molecule and polymer characterization supporting process development and scale-up activities.
Apply statistical process control and DOE methodologies to establish robust analytical methods and process control strategies.
Developed and validated analytical methods using HPLC, FT-IR, UV-Vis, and mass spectrometry for small molecule characterization, purity assessment, and stability monitoring.
Conducted forced degradation studies to characterize degradation pathways and establish stability-indicating methods for organic compounds.
Performed comprehensive materials characterization using thermal analysis (TGA, DSC) and spectroscopic techniques to support formulation and process development.
Managed analytical laboratory operations ensuring instrument calibration, maintenance, and compliance with quality standards.
Developed SOPs for analytical methods and instrumentation; trained researchers on proper techniques and data documentation.

skills.Analytical Techniques: HPLC, LC-MS, GC-MS, FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, TGA, DSC, NMR, GPC
skills.CMC & Quality: CMC analytical development, method development, method validation, stability testing, impurity profiling, specification development
skills.Statistical Tools: DOE, SPC, JMP, statistical analysis, Excel (advanced)
skills.Regulatory Knowledge: Familiar with cGMP concepts, ICH guidelines, data integrity, documentation practices

publications: Ramasamy Selvaraju, V.; Venta, R.; Rajapaksha, I.; Zhang, J.; Barlow, S.; Salman, S.; Scott, C.; Marder, S. "Narrow-Band Electrochromism of a Ferrocene-Substituted Rhodamine B." Chemistry of Materials, 2025, 37, 5558–5568.

Mandal, J.; Ramasamy Selvaraju, V.; Yan, W.; Divandari, M.; Spencer, N. D.; Dubner, M. "In Situ Monitoring of SI-ATRP Throughout Multiple Reinitiations Under Flow by Means of a Quartz Crystal Microbalance." RSC Advances, 2018, 8, 20048–20055.

projects.title: Bio-based Polymer Process Development
projects.description: Led chemical process development for novel bio-based polymer systems using statistical experimental design.

projects.title: AFOSR Defense Coatings Program
projects.description: Co-led process development for high-performance molecular thin-film coatings for defense optical applications.
